job_summary: A GCP Auditor specializes in auditing clinical trials specifically against Good Clinical Practice standards to ensure ethical and scientific integrity.
key_responsibilities: Conduct site, system, and process audits
Ensure compliance with GCP and regulatory guidelines
Audit investigator sites and clinical data
qualifications: Experience in clinical monitoring or QA
career_path: GCP Auditor → Lead Auditor → QA Manager
skills_required: audit investigator sites and clinical data
conduct site, system, and process audits
